meta.title: How to print your own replica of America's newest air-to-air missile!
meta.description:
Learn how to make your own full-scale 3D printed replica of America’s newest (and smallest) air-to-air missile, the AGR-20 FALCO, also known as the infrared-guided Advanced Precision Kill Weapon System II — which is America’s low-cost, high volume answer to the low-cost kamikaze drones that are becoming increasingly common on today’s battlefield. 

Check out RexiLabs on MakerWorld for this and other great print profiles! This is not a sponsored post, but I did ask for permission to feature these models in our videos!
"https://makerworld.com/en/@rexilabs"
(YouTube has an issue with embedding the link, so copy and paste this to reach Rexi Labs)
